description_long: This object is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular profile and a matte black finish. The device features a large, flat display connected to a base by a central hinge, allowing the screen to open and close. The keyboard is full-sized with a standard QWERTY layout, including a function row and a spacious touchpad below the keys. The exterior lid is plain except for a subtle circular marking in the center, which may serve as a decorative element or logo. The laptop's edges are slightly beveled, and the overall design is minimalist, with no visible stickers or branding apart from the circular mark. No ports or connectors are clearly visible in the provided views.
description: A sleek, matte black laptop with a full keyboard, large screen, and minimalist design featuring a circular mark on the lid.
description_view_0: The left side of the laptop is visible, showing the open screen, keyboard, and touchpad, with the hinge and side profile clearly defined.
description_view_1: The back of the laptop lid is shown, dominated by a circular mark in the center and no visible ports or features.
description_view_2: The right side of the laptop is visible, similar to view 0 but from the opposite angle, showing the keyboard, touchpad, and screen.
description_view_3: A direct front view of the laptop, displaying the full keyboard, touchpad, and the open, blank screen.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and appears to be off, with no visible content or illumination.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad; all keys are visible and standard in size.
